text: Trump floats siege on Iran stronghold as Tehran loosens grip on Strait of Hormuz - Fox News
fullText: President Donald Trump suggested the U.S. may seize Iran's Kharg Island on Monday as Tehran allowed 20 cargo ships to travel through the Strait of Hormuz.

text: Fighter jets scrambled, flares deployed after plane spotted near Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort - CBS News
fullText: Fighter jets were scrambled over Palm Beach after a civilian plane breached restricted airspace near President Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort, officials said.

text: Trump says he has "no problem" with Russian tanker bringing oil to Cuba despite blockade - CBS News
fullText: When asked if a New York Times report that the tanker would be allowed to reach Cuba was true, Mr. Trump said: "If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem whether it's Russia or not."

text: Can the ‘Dubai Dream’ Survive the War? Residents Say Life Goes On. - The New York Times
How a SCOTUS decision on birthright citizenship could impact education access - NPR
fullText: All children, regardless of immigration status, have the right to a free K-12 public education. But without birthright citizenship, access to schools and colleges could get complicated.

text: Poll: MAHA wants more. They may turn to Democrats to get it. - Politico
fullText: A new POLITICO Poll finds cracks in the coalition that helped put HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and President Donald Trump in office.

text: China’s chatbot industry is fiercely competing for customers. Cue the freebies - NPR
fullText: Chinese AI companies are focused less on being cutting edge and more on attracting customers. That means holiday promotions, and making chatbots useful in everyday life.

text: How much protein do you need? Here's how to personalize your optimal intake - NPR
fullText: The Dietary Guidelines released this year recommend higher levels of this essential nutrient. But protein needs are personal. Here's how to assess yours.

text: Trump says he is considering seizing Iran's Kharg Island, but deal could be made 'very quickly' - BBC
fullText: The US president's comments come alongside briefings from US officials about the readiness of troops to carry out ground operations.

text: US Sees First Combat Loss of Valuable E-3 Jet in Missile Strike - Bloomberg.com
fullText: An Iranian missile strike on a base in Saudi Arabia damaged several military jets and destroyed a valuable E-3 Sentry early warning and control aircraft — the first known combat loss for that type.

fullText: Sovereign bonds rose around the world as concern the Middle East conflict will derail global economic growth revives demand for beaten-down government debt.

text: NFL Referees Association accuses NFL of spreading "false and misleading" information - NBC Sports
fullText: The NFLRA fires back at recent NFL leaks.

text: ‘Tomb Raider’ Star Sophie Turner Injured; Amazon Series Pauses Production - Deadline
fullText: Filming has been halted on Amazon MGM Studios' high-profile series Tomb Raider after star Sophie Turner was injured.

fullText: “I’m living in the States and you know what’s happening there,” the legendary folk singer said while receiving a lifetime achievement award at Canada’s music awards.

text: A formerly low-profile COVID variant is spreading fast. Here’s what to know - OregonLive.com
fullText: There's no sign the variant is more dangerous. But since it's different from prior versions, current vaccines may not be as effective.

text: ICE officers could remain at airports after TSA workers are paid - NPR
fullText: Even when Transportation Security Administration workers get paid, Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents could still be present at U.S. airports.
